## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/validate-registry.mjs` passes — 0 errors
- [ ] `npm run validate:tokens` passes — 0 errors
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] All component variants are implemented (not just the happy path)
- [ ] ARIA attributes from the spec are included
- [ ] Dark mode tested
- [ ] No hardcoded hex values or pixel values (use `var(--ds-*)` tokens)
- [ ] Storybook story added or updated
- [ ] Changeset added (`npx changeset`)
